title: 🦞 How to set up OpenClaw across WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack

+ [AMD Ryzen VDS4.5 GHz Ryzen with dedicated CPU power](https://lumadock.com/order/amd-ryzen-vps). * [OpenClaw VPS](/openclaw-vps-hosting). # How to set up OpenClaw across WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord and Slack. Multi-channel does not mean “I installed three bots.” It means one long-running Gateway process receives messages from different platforms and routes them into the same session store. The official OpenClaw docs describe the Gateway as the central control plane for channels, sessions, and tool execution. Unlike WhatsApp or Telegram, Discord is structured around servers, channels, threads, and roles. ## Home server vs VPS for multi-channel. **VPS** setups are better when you want OpenClaw online 24/7, stable networking, and clean isolation from your personal devices. If you plan to use webhooks for Telegram or Slack, a VPS also makes the networking story much simpler. [Launch your OpenClaw VPS](https://lumadock.com/cart.php). LumaDock offers fast, affordable VPS hosting for developers, businesses, and gamers, including GPU and Game Server Hosting, powered by NVMe storage and AMD EPYC. * [Custom VPS](https://lumadock.com/order/custom-vps/performance-vps). * [OpenClaw hostingNew](/openclaw-vps-hosting).

For step-by-step screenshots and the full panel + onboarding flow, use the deployment guide: https://www.tencentcloud.com/techpedia/139184. Even if the template handles day-one setup, you still need a repeatable way to configure models, connect channels, install skills, and keep the gateway alive. # One-time onboarding (interactive) # Keep the agent running as a background service whoami export id. * Installing OpenClaw Skills and practical applications. Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

# Cron Jobs. # ​ Cron jobs (Gateway scheduler). openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>`. ## ​ Tool-call equivalents (Gateway cron tool). ## ​ Where cron jobs are stored. ## ​ Concepts. ### ​ Jobs. ### ​ Schedules. #### ​ Main session jobs (system events). #### ​ Isolated jobs (dedicated cron sessions). ### ​ Payload shapes (what runs). #### ​ Webhook delivery flow. ### ​ cron.add params. ### ​ cron.update params. ### ​ cron.run and cron.remove params. `~/.openclaw/cron/runs/<jobId>.jsonl`. ## ​ Retry policy. ## ​ Configuration. store: "~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json",. ## ​ Maintenance. ### ​ Defaults. ### ​ How it works. openclaw cron add --name "Ops sweep" --cron "0 6 * * *" --session isolated --message "Check ops queue" --agent ops. openclaw cron edit <jobId> --agent ops. openclaw cron edit <jobId> --clear-agent`. openclaw cron run <jobId> --due`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId>`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. ### ​ A recurring job keeps delaying after failures.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron jobs: Scheduling AI Agents for Automated ...
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Comprehensive product guide for OpenClaw cron jobs: features, architecture, integrations, pricing, security, and best practices to schedule AI agent workflows reliably in 2025. OpenClaw cron jobs enable precise, timezone-aware scheduling of AI agents, ensuring reliable execution across distributed environments while minimizing manual interventions (24 words). OpenClaw cron jobs provide a managed scheduling service designed specifically for automating AI agent workflows, enabling teams to orchestrate complex tasks with precision and reliability without managing underlying infrastructure. Unlike traditional cron or Kubernetes CronJob, which require manual scaling and lack built-in AI-specific features, OpenClaw offers serverless execution with retries, idempotency support, and timezone-aware scheduling, making automated agent orchestration seamless for AI/ML teams facing irregular workloads and failure-prone environments. This section provides an analytical guide to instrumenting OpenClaw cron jobs for effective monitoring, covering key cron job metrics, structured logging practices, OpenTelemetry tracing integration, alert configurations, and operational runbooks to ensure reliable scheduled tasks.

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. --system-event "Reminder: review the weekly report" \. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. # Delete a job. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Share this post. ##### Company AI Operations Need Ontology: It Is Not Just IT’s Job.
